Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The DECLARE model dictionary has specific keys Unary constraints existence absence exactly one init Binary constraints responded existence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unary constraints the value is a dict with activities as keys and value being a tuple or dict of support and confidence Actually looking at pm4py source code it is typically a tuple support confidence Lets use 1 0 1 0

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The prompt specifies the activities Idea Generation IG Design Draft DD Technical Feasibility Check TFC Cost Evaluation CE Prototype Creation PC Laboratory Testing LT User Testing UT Approval Gate AG Marketing Plan MP Final Launch FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to create a logical DECLARE model for this scenario The process starts with IG init IG 1 0 1 0

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Binary constraints Keys are tuples of activities for example IG DD and values are support confidence Response If IG happens DD eventually happens response IG DD 1 0 1 0 DD TFC 1 0 1 0

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the prompt says For the keys the value is a dictionary containing as keys the activities and as corresponding value the support 1 0 and confidence Wait for binary constraints the key is usually a tuple of activities in pm4py

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the binary constraints the keys should be tuples of activities because a single activity key would not make sense for binary constraints So IG DD 1 0 1 0

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets populate them with logical activities from the scenario Activities IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Every product needs an approval gate and final launch Maybe just IG and FL are strictly existing Lets put IG DD TFC CE PC LT AG FL

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Absence maybe some activities should not happen more than once Wait absence usually means the activity never occurs Lets leave it empty to be safe and logical

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exactly one Maybe Final Launch happens exactly once IG and FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Responded existence If PC happens LT must happen If PC happens UT must happen Coexistence LT and UT always occur together

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process flow IG to DD to TFC to CE to PC to LT to UT to AG to MP to FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Response IG DD DD TFC PC LT AG MP MP FL Precedence IG DD DD PC LT AG MP FL Succession IG DD MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altresponse IG FL Altprecedence PC AG Altsuccession IG DD Chainresponse AG MP MP FL Chainprecedence IG DD LT UT Chainsuccession IG DD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: Noncoexistence DD FL Design Draft and Final Launch cannot both occur in the same trace

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Nonsuccession AG DD After approval design draft cannot follow LT DD After lab testing design draft cannot follow Nonchainsuccession TFC PC because CE must happen LT AG because UT must happen

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets review the requirements to ensure nothing is missed All 18 keys present Structure matches prompt exactly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For unary existence IG 1 0 1 0 For binary response IG DD 1 0 1 0 This perfectly matches standard pm4py output for DECLARE models
